repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-065.

Source PR: #89949 by @wangwllu. This preserves the contributor's announce-delivery fix and attribution while repairing the maintainer-editable branch enough to clear the failing native Telegram proof before any merge decision.

Scope:
- Keep the requester-origin `to` backfill focused in `src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts`.
- Keep or adjust the focused coverage in `src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`.
- Re-run `pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`.

Do not broaden this into unrelated message-delivery or channel-routing changes.
